description: Complete Azure assertion mapping with 100% coverage including KMS/crypto services

identity_access.title: Strong authentication methods are enabled for user accounts
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Service accounts use secure authentication mechanisms
identity_access.rationale: Service accounts are high-value targets for attackers. Secure authentication prevents service account compromise and lateral movement.

identity_access.title: Legacy authentication protocols are disabled
identity_access.rationale: Legacy authentication protocols have known vulnerabilities and weak security. Disabling them prevents exploitation of outdated authentication methods.

identity_access.title: Session timeout is configured for interactive sessions
identity_access.rationale: Session timeouts limit exposure window for compromised sessions. Shorter timeouts reduce risk of unauthorized access from abandoned sessions.

identity_access.title: Service roles are used instead of long‑lived user access keys
identity_access.rationale: Workloads should assume IAM roles to obtain short‑lived credentials. Long‑lived user access keys increase compromise risk and violate least privilege for services.

identity_access.title: Strong authentication is enforced for access to identities
identity_access.rationale: Access control requires strong authentication to reduce account takeover risk across identity-aware services.

identity_access.title: Sessions are constrained with strict timeouts and conditions
identity_access.rationale: Short session lifetimes and conditional access reduce lateral movement opportunities and window of exposure.

identity_access.title: Legacy and insecure authentication methods are disabled
identity_access.rationale: Disabling legacy protocols and insecure auth flows prevents exploitation of outdated authentication mechanisms.

identity_access.title: Permission boundaries are enforced for privileged roles
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Resource-based policies are properly configured
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Conditional access policies are enabled
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: External identity providers are properly configured
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Trust relationships are properly managed
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Cross-account access is properly controlled
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: MFA is enforced for all privileged user accounts
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Backup authentication methods are available for MFA
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Hardware-based MFA tokens are required for privileged accounts
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Session duration is limited for security
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Temporary credentials are properly controlled
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Proper authentication and authorization prevent unauthorized access and reduce the risk of account compromise.

identity_access.title: Require phishing-resistant auth for privileged users
identity_access.rationale: Admins must use FIDO2/WebAuthn or equivalent passwordless methods.

identity_access.title: Enable workload identity for service-to-service auth
identity_access.rationale: Service accounts must use workload identity instead of static credentials.

identity_access.title: Enforce continuous access evaluation for sensitive resources
identity_access.rationale: CAE must be enabled for high-value resources with real-time risk assessment.

identity_access.title: Require hardware security keys for privileged access
identity_access.rationale: Privileged users must have hardware-based authentication factors.

identity_access.title: Implement biometric verification for mobile access
identity_access.rationale: Mobile access must use biometric authentication where supported.

identity_access.title: Verify zero-trust authentication policies
identity_access.rationale: Authentication policies must enforce zero-trust principles with device trust.

identity_access.title: Restrict emergency break-glass accounts
identity_access.rationale: Emergency accounts must be limited, monitored, and time-bound.

identity_access.title: Isolate privileged access workstations
identity_access.rationale: PAW workstations must be isolated from general network access.

identity_access.title: Monitor all break-glass access attempts
identity_access.rationale: All break-glass access must be logged and monitored in real-time.

identity_access.title: Review emergency access within 24 hours
identity_access.rationale: Emergency access must be reviewed and justified within 24 hours.

identity_access.title: Implement just-in-time access for break-glass scenarios
identity_access.rationale: Break-glass access must be time-limited and automatically revoked.

identity_access.title: Excess permissions are restricted for identities
identity_access.rationale: Identity and access controls are fundamental to cloud security. Enforcing least privilege reduces blast radius and prevents privilege escalation.

identity_access.title: MFA is enforced for all members of privileged groups
identity_access.rationale: Group-based MFA ensures all privileged users have strong authentication.

identity_access.title: Privileged access management is implemented
identity_access.rationale: Privileged access management prevents unauthorized access to critical systems and data.

identity_access.title: Just-in-time access is implemented for privileged accounts
identity_access.rationale: Just-in-time access reduces the attack surface by limiting privileged access duration.

identity_access.title: Zero trust architecture principles are implemented
identity_access.rationale: Zero trust architecture ensures continuous verification and least privilege access.

rbac_entitlements.title: Roles are defined with least privilege principles
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Service-linked roles are used where appropriate
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Role assignments are limited to necessary principals
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Just-in-time access is enabled for privileged roles
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Regular access reviews are conducted
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Unused permissions are identified and removed
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Entitlement lifecycle is properly managed
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Temporary access is properly controlled
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Role-based access control ensures users have appropriate permissions. This reduces the risk of privilege escalation and maintains the principle of least privilege.

rbac_entitlements.title: Detect toxic role combinations
rbac_entitlements.rationale: System must detect and prevent toxic permission combinations.

rbac_entitlements.title: Segregate approval and execution roles
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Users cannot have both approval and execution permissions for same resources.

rbac_entitlements.title: Segregate financial control functions
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Financial approval, execution, and reconciliation must be separate roles.

rbac_entitlements.title: Separate administrative and audit roles
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Administrative and audit roles must be assigned to different users.

rbac_entitlements.title: Conduct periodic segregation of duties review
rbac_entitlements.rationale: SOD violations must be reviewed and remediated quarterly.

rbac_entitlements.title: Group-based roles follow least privilege principles
rbac_entitlements.rationale: Group roles should be scoped to minimum required permissions.

crypto_data_protection.title: Enable WORM storage for regulated data
crypto_data_protection.rationale: Regulated data must be stored in WORM-compliant storage.

crypto_data_protection.title: Implement legal hold protection
crypto_data_protection.rationale: Data under legal hold must be protected from modification or deletion.

crypto_data_protection.rationale: Audit logs must be stored in immutable format with tamper protection.

crypto_data_protection.title: Enforce retention lock policies
crypto_data_protection.rationale: Retention locks must prevent premature data deletion.

crypto_data_protection.title: Ensure compliance with immutability requirements
crypto_data_protection.rationale: Data must comply with regulatory immutability requirements.

crypto_data_protection.title: Database tables are encrypted at rest

crypto_data_protection.title: Storage snapshots are encrypted
crypto_data_protection.rationale: Snapshot encryption prevents data exposure from backup access.

data_protection_storage.title: Data anonymization is implemented for sensitive data
data_protection_storage.rationale: Data anonymization protects privacy while enabling data analytics.

compute_host_security.title: Unused instances are removed according to defined policies
compute_host_security.rationale: Removing unused instances reduces attack surface and cost exposure.

compute_host_security.title: Unused network interfaces are removed
compute_host_security.rationale: Removing unused network interfaces reduces attack surface.

compute_host_security.title: Volume deletion on termination is enabled
compute_host_security.rationale: Automatic volume deletion prevents data persistence after instance termination.

compute_host_security.title: Install EDR agents on all hosts
compute_host_security.rationale: All compute instances must have EDR agents installed and running.

compute_host_security.title: Ensure patch management agents are healthy
compute_host_security.rationale: Patch management agents must be installed and reporting status.

compute_host_security.title: Deploy configuration management agents
compute_host_security.rationale: Configuration management agents must be deployed on all hosts.

compute_host_security.title: Keep security agents up to date
compute_host_security.rationale: Security agents must be running current versions.

compute_host_security.title: Monitor agent connectivity and health
compute_host_security.rationale: Agent connectivity must be monitored and alerts configured.

compute_host_security.title: Vulnerability remediation SLAs are defined and tracked
compute_host_security.rationale: Timely remediation of vulnerabilities reduces exposure to known exploits.

compute_host_security.title: Images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment
compute_host_security.rationale: Pre-deployment scanning prevents vulnerable images from being deployed.

compute_host_security.title: AMI encryption is enabled for all images
compute_host_security.rationale: Encrypted AMIs ensure data protection and compliance requirements.

compute_host_security.title: AMI public access is restricted to authorized users only
compute_host_security.rationale: Restricting public access prevents unauthorized use of AMIs.

compute_host_security.title: AMI age management is enforced with defined policies
compute_host_security.rationale: Age management ensures AMIs are current and secure.

compute_host_security.title: Only approved AMIs are used for instance creation
compute_host_security.rationale: Using only approved AMIs ensures consistency, security, and compliance with organizational standards.

compute_host_security.title: Unused EBS volumes are identified and removed
compute_host_security.rationale: Removing unused volumes reduces cost and prevents unauthorized access to orphaned data.

compute_host_security.title: EC2 instances do not have public IP addresses
compute_host_security.rationale: Disabling public IPs reduces attack surface and forces traffic through controlled gateways.

compute_host_security.title: EC2 instances do not use default security groups
compute_host_security.rationale: Default security groups often have overly permissive rules that increase attack surface.

containers_kubernetes.title: Environment variables containing secrets are secured
containers_kubernetes.rationale: Securing environment variables prevents secret exposure.

containers_kubernetes.title: Pod security restrictions are enforced for workloads

serverless_paas.rationale: Serverless functions must not contain plaintext secrets in environment variables.

serverless_paas.rationale: Restricting public access prevents unauthorized function execution.

serverless_paas.title: Apply least privilege to secret access

misc.title: Incident response runbooks are defined and maintained

vulnerability_management.title: Automated vulnerability patching is enabled
vulnerability_management.rationale: Automated patching reduces the window of exposure to known vulnerabilities.

vulnerability_management.title: Regular vulnerability scans are performed
